items.title: Seven-star Sanderson routs Worcestershire by an innings
items.summary: Seamer devastates opposition with six wickets in 29 balls en route to three-day win
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: IPL 2026: RCB’s Phil Salt returns home for scans after finger injury
items.summary: RCB and Salt are hopeful of a speedy recovery and that the opener can return to India later this month

items.title: Watch: SPFL round-up as Inverness CT & East Kilbride celebrate
